page: Microsoft Azure F48ams_v6 is a memory-intensive virtual machine belonging to the Famsv6 family, powered by an x86_64 AMD EPYC 9V74 processor. It features 48 dedicated physical cores and 48 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 3.7 GHz, with a 1:1 thread-to-core allocation. The system is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, providing 8.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

In benchmark evaluations, the F48ams_v6 demonstrates top-tier CPU capabilities, placing in the top 10% for both single-core and multi-core stress-ng performance. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, software compilation with Clang, and image processing also rank in the top 10%. Memory bandwidth is strong, reaching 226.16 GB/sec for large-block read-only operations and 144.16 GB/sec for write operations. The server also performs well in LLM inference, achieving top-tier prompt processing speeds of 5369.82 tokens/sec with small models, though performance drops to average levels when handling large 70B models.

Given its dedicated hardware allocation and high memory-to-vCPU ratio, the F48ams_v6 offers high resource density for memory-bound workloads without the overhead of hyperthreading. The lack of bundled local storage represents a tradeoff, requiring external premium storage configuration. This profile is highly suitable for memory-intensive databases, software compilation pipelines, and medium-scale LLM inference tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure F48ams_v6 is a memory-intensive virtual machine from the Famsv6 family, built on the x86_64 architecture with an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor. It delivers 48 dedicated physical cores and 48 vCPUs running at 3.7 GHz, paired with 384.0 GB of RAM. While it lacks bundled local storage and GPUs, it supports Premium Storage. Benchmarks show top-tier CPU performance, with stress-ng single-core and multi-core results in the top 10%, alongside strong memory bandwidth and rapid software compilation capabilities. The server is highly effective for memory-intensive databases, software development pipelines, and medium-scale language model inference.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F48ams_v6 is a memory-intensive virtual machine featuring 48 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 384 GB RAM, and top-tier CPU performance for databases and software compilation.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure F48ams_v6 features 48 dedicated AMD EPYC cores and 384 GB RAM, delivering top-tier CPU performance for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC virtual machine with high memory density and top-tier compute performance for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated AMD EPYC 9V74 physical cores running at 3.7 GHz
384.0 GB of system memory providing an 8.0 GB per core ratio
Top-tier multi-core CPU performance and software compilation speeds
Premium Storage capable configuration with no bundled local storage
Well-suited for memory-intensive databases and medium-scale LLM inference
